title: Junior Business Development Manager at Smartworks

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Smartworks
jsonLd.description:
Smartworks, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Smartworks:
Smartworks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Smartworks!
